title: Mythic Hammers
description: An Addon for Mythic Metals that adds some more hammers.
body:
A minecraft mod I made a while ago. Adds some more hammers to Mythic Metals!

Prometheum Hammer: A slightly faster version of the original Orichalcum hammer. Possesses the same regrowth ability as the other prometheum tools.

Mythraxul: A shovel version of the hammer that does all the same wide area mining, just with dirt and gravel and sand and all those goodies.

Adamantite Hammer: An unobtanium powered hammer that can effortlessly bore holes through the ground!
